subject: fix(export): replace window.print PDF with jsPDF direct download
body:
The previous PDF export used window.open + window.print, which was broken
on mobile: opened an about:blank tab, mobile browsers ignored @page size
CSS (defaulting to A4/Letter instead of platform dimensions), and required
navigating a print dialog instead of downloading directly.

Switched to jsPDF which generates the PDF in-memory with exact platform
dimensions and triggers a direct file download. Also renamed button from
"Save as PDF" to "Download as PDF" to match the actual behavior.

Tags: export, pdf, mobile, fix
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: minor
